brand.name: Mujanti
brand.tagline: Strategic Capacity Partner for NGOs, Startups, FPOs & Carbon Credits
brand.description: Mujanti — India's Strategic Capacity Partner, driving precise, mentorship-led transitions for NGOs, startups and FPOs through carbon credit consulting, regenerative agriculture, and impact-driven digital transformation.

hero.subheadline: India's dedicated Strategic Capacity Partner — driving precise, mentorship-led transitions for NGOs, startups, and FPOs. We define the "vital few" leverage points that drive efficiency, clarify challenges, and accelerate growth, backed by end-to-end carbon credit, digital, and regenerative agriculture expertise.
